Contact Us

# "Unplug from the Noise. Let the Winds Guide the Rest."

# Time is ticking, LET'S GO!!!

Welcome to Guiding Winds

"Unplug" , where the essence of adventure meets the tranquility of the ocean. Our mission is to help you unplug from the everyday hustle and reconnect with nature and yourself. Embark on a journey across pristine waters, explore breathtaking islands, and immerse yourself in the laidback island lifestyle. Whether you're seeking guided meditations, unique wellness experiences or hands-on sailing adventure, Guiding Winds "Unplug" invites you to embrace the freedom of the sea and peace of "unplugged" living!

# Charters in the Caribbean

# British Virgin Islands: Jan.-March 2027 $3550 per person

# Bahamas: March-May 2027 $3550 per person

# British Virgin Islands: Nov.-Dec. 2027 $3550 per person

# Charters in the Mediterranean

# Italy- July 2027 $3850 per person

# Greece- Aug. & Sept. 2027 $3850 per person

# Croatia- Sept. & Oct. 2027 $3850 per person

![](https://images.leadconnectorhq.com/image/f_webp/q_80/r_1200/u_https://assets.cdn.filesafe.space/Ytq1Qi48bKj3ZImQ9Ye8/media/c5e14604-a5a4-4c6d-b4a9-7691cdb3f2bf.png)

# Adventures of a Lifetime.

# We promise, your life will never be the same!

![](https://images.leadconnectorhq.com/image/f_webp/q_80/r_1200/u_https://assets.cdn.filesafe.space/Ytq1Qi48bKj3ZImQ9Ye8/media/c5e14604-a5a4-4c6d-b4a9-7691cdb3f2bf.png)

**Whats included and what can I expect?**

I put together a sailing trip and I'm looking for sun-seekers to fill the deck! I’ll be at the helm and keeping the galley stocked with food.

Think daily snorkel stops, pristine anchorages, and island hopping with a great group of 8–12 people.

You’ll have your own **private cabin and bathroom**, so you have plenty of space to recharge!

**_Meet Clint and Dodie Kendall_**

**_Guiding Winds “Unplug” is more than a charter service—it’s a journey into the heart of the sea, guided by two souls who have lived their lives on and near the water._**

**_Clint Kendall was born in Miami Beach and raised in the Florida Keys, where the ocean was not just a backdrop, but a way of life. He grew up to become a long-liner fisherman, earning a reputation as an incredible fisherman with an unmatched passion for the salt life. The sea is in his blood, and his knowledge of the waters is as deep as the ocean itself._**

**_Dodie Kendall, also a native Floridian was born in Fort Lauderdale and raised in Pompano Beach. Dodie shares Clint’s love for the water. Her journey, however, also includes a deep passion for helping others find their spiritual path. Dodie believes in the power of the sea to reconnect us with who we truly are. Together, Clint and Dodie have spent years cruising the waters of the British Virgin Islands, falling in love with the catamaran lifestyle and the freedom it brings._**

**_After experiencing the magic of life on the water, Clint and Dodie decided to share their passion with others. They founded Guiding Winds “Unplug” to offer more than just a charter—it’s an invitation to disconnect from the noise of everyday life and reconnect with nature, adventure, and yourself._**

**_With their extensive experience and genuine love for the sea, Clint and Dodie ensure that every journey aboard Guiding Winds is tailored to provide the best and most appropriate experience for all who join the crew. Whether you’re seeking adventure, relaxation, or spiritual renewal, they are here to guide you._**

**_Join Clint and Dodie on Guiding Winds “Unplug” and let the ocean show you the way._**

* * *

![](https://images.leadconnectorhq.com/image/f_webp/q_80/r_1200/u_https://assets.cdn.filesafe.space/Ytq1Qi48bKj3ZImQ9Ye8/media/6978ff59eb0d1a3cf4c01738.jpeg)

# Let us show you some of the experiences we have shared.

At Guiding Winds "Unplug", we don’t just charter boats; we curate unforgettable island stories. From the quiet serenity of a sunrise sail to the vibrant energy of exploring untouched reefs, every journey is a shared discovery. We take you beyond the tourist maps to the secret spots where the water is bluer and the world feels a little more still. Come unplug with us and find your own slice of paradise.

Book Now

![](https://images.leadconnectorhq.com/image/f_webp/q_80/r_1200/u_https://assets.cdn.filesafe.space/Ytq1Qi48bKj3ZImQ9Ye8/media/697291db4a646490ed6c3867.jpg)

★  ★  ★  ★  ★

"Our trip with Guiding Winds was nothing short of perfection. We spent our days island hopping and soaking up every bit of the sun on the catamaran. Dodie and Clint have truly mastered the art of hospitality—they made everything feel so effortless and dreamy. If you’re looking for gorgeous waters and a stress-free getaway, this is it. We can’t wait to come back!"

Read more

![Joe and Danielle Steen](https://storage.googleapis.com/msgsndr/Ytq1Qi48bKj3ZImQ9Ye8/media/698f9ae87d68771184d0932e.jpg)

Joe and Danielle Steen

St. Augustine, Florida

★  ★  ★  ★  ★

"What an unbelievable experience! We loved the balance of relaxing in the sun and getting some fishing in. The catamaran is the perfect way to see the islands, and the water was absolutely stunning. Huge thanks to Dodie and Clint for being such incredible hosts. They made the entire journey seamless from start to finish. Highly recommend!"

Read more

![Tommy Lyn and Alisha](https://storage.googleapis.com/msgsndr/Ytq1Qi48bKj3ZImQ9Ye8/media/698b383e67d7494f904bbb75.jpg)

Tommy Lyn and Alisha

Tennessee

★  ★  ★  ★  ★

"I’ve done a fair share of traveling, but this trip with Guiding Winds stands out. Island hopping on the catamaran was the highlight of my year—the views were incredible and the fishing was top-notch. Dodie and Clint are the real deal; they handle all the details so you can just enjoy the gorgeous scenery. A truly first-class experience."

Read more

![Frank Zuckero](https://storage.googleapis.com/msgsndr/Ytq1Qi48bKj3ZImQ9Ye8/media/698f9cb0008498d63a5288d7.jpg)

Michigan
